prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 4.2L Audi-derived V8 (engine code: **Gumpert 4.2L V8 Twin-Turbo, internal designation: GTR-4200**) with a fully forged internals build featuring **Manley 4340 steel connecting rods (H-beam, 156mm length)**, **JE Pistons 2618 forged aluminum (9.0:1 compression, custom dome for boost resilience)**, and **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** to handle 1,200+ HP reliably. Pair with **DLC-coated (Diamond-Like Carbon) camshafts from Schrick (288° intake / 292° exhaust, 12.5mm lift)** for optimized airflow at high RPM.

Forced Induction: Swap the stock **KKK K36 turbos** for a **Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA (dual ball-bearing, 62mm inducer, 84mm exducer)** setup with **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates (dual-port, 3-bar springs)** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV (dual-stage, 50mm)** to eliminate compressor surge. Custom **3.5-inch Inconel 625 turbo manifolds (equal-length, merge-collector design)** by **SPELAB** ensure optimal exhaust gas velocity and spool characteristics.

Drivetrain & Cooling: Install a **Tilton 7.25-inch triple-plate carbon-carbon clutch (1,800 Nm torque capacity)** with a **Penske 8760 adjustable shock (remote reservoir, 4-way damping)** for launch control. Replace the stock intercooler with a **PWR 4.5L bar-and-plate core (5.5-inch thick, 1,200 HP-rated)** and **Motec M150 ECU (with flex-fuel and traction control mapping)** for real-time lambda and boost control. Add a **Setrab 10-row oil cooler (Series 1, 54mm core)** and **Moroso 10-quart dry-sump system (4-stage, -12AN fittings)** to prevent oil starvation under sustained lateral G-forces.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Fit the **Gumpert Apollo Race-specific 'Black Series' carbon fiber aero package** (OEM+), including a **fixed rear wing with Gurney flap (3D-printed titanium endplates, 1,200mm span)** and **front splitter with integrated dive planes (adjustable angle, 30mm extension)**. Add **Vorsteiner V-FF 107 carbon fiber side skirts (pre-preg autoclave, 2x2 twill weave)** for improved downforce and airflow management.

Body & Lighting: Replace the stock body panels with **Gumpert's 'Track Attack' carbon fiber monocoque (full replacement, 30% weight reduction)** and **Lexan polycarbonate side windows (0.5-inch thick, scratch-resistant coating)**. Install **Oracle Lighting RGB+ Halo LED headlights (6,000K, sequential turn signals)** and **custom titanium exhaust tips (3.5-inch diameter, laser-etched Gumpert logo)** by **REMUS** for a signature look.

Interior & Styling: Retrofit the cabin with **Sparco Pro 2000 carbon fiber seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified, 6-point harness slots)** and a **MOMO Mod.77 steering wheel (flat-bottom, Alcantara grip, quick-release hub)**. Add a **Motec C127 dash logger (12-inch display, CAN bus integration)** and **custom titanium shift knob (weighted, CNC-machined from billet 6AL-4V alloy)**. Finish with **Forge Motorsport titanium pedal set (adjustable, laser-etched grip pattern)** and **carbon fiber door cards (3K weave, red stitching)** for a race-ready yet luxurious feel.
